violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Ice provided from another source during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the (basement) 3 bay sink area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2026

The (bar) wall is in poor repair. Inspector observed large gap/separation. The floors in the beverage room are in need of cleaning. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The walls in the (basement) storage area are in poor repair. Owner to add wall material that has been cut out. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
The basement has an accumulation of clutter and unecessary equipment. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
